Speak With Confidence

Most speaking courses teach you what to say.
This one fixes why your body shuts down before you get the chance to say it.

A nervous-system reset for the moment your voice goes quiet — built by someone who lived it, not studied it.

Navveeta Daulat Singh Reiki Master Healer & Founder, Happiest Minds At Work

I used to know exactly what I wanted to say — and still say nothing.

Not because I lacked the words. Because the moment I felt eyes on me, something in my body would just... shut the door. I was funny. I knew I was funny. But the fear of being judged would silence me before a single word came out.

I didn't fix this with a speaking class. I fixed it with Reiki.

As I kept practicing on myself, something shifted that had nothing to do with "tips" or "techniques." My nervous system stopped treating attention like a threat. I started speaking up in meetings without rehearsing it in my head first. And slowly, people in my newsroom started noticing things about me they'd never seen before — my humor, my opinions, my actual personality. The same parts of me that used to die in my throat before I could let them out.

"I am the most charming, witty version of myself today."

Some mornings, that's the healing intention I'd give myself. And I'd watch it happen. No script. No forced jokes. Just... me, finally let out.

That's not confidence you perform. That's confidence you become.

The Method

Speak With Confidence is built on exactly this.

Not affirmations. Not "fake it till you make it." A real nervous-system reset — the same energy work that rewired my own fear response — combined with the practical speaking and self-expression tools to give that newly-calm body something to say and how to say it.

Because here's the truth most speaking coaches won't tell you: you can have the perfect script, the perfect structure, the perfect three-point argument — and still freeze, blank out, or shrink the second it's your turn to talk. That's not a knowledge gap. That's your body protecting you from being judged. And no amount of "just speak louder" fixes that.

I know, because I lived on the wrong side of that line for years. And I know how to move you to the other side of it — because I did it myself, in real rooms, under real judgment, until it stopped being something I had to manage and started being who I am.

What's Inside

8 Live Sessions. 4 Weeks.

2 sessions a week, for four weeks — until the freeze response that's been running your life quietly loosens its grip.

The Reset

A guided nervous-system reset woven seamlessly into the session. You won't be told "now we're doing Reiki." You'll just notice your shoulders drop, your breath slow down, and a calm settle in that has nothing to do with trying harder.

The Voice

While your body is in that regulated state — not before, not separately — practical speaking and self-expression work: finding your real voice, structuring your thoughts on the spot, holding eye contact without it feeling like a threat.

By week 4, you're not managing your nerves in a room. You're not in that room at all anymore.

With 1:1 Reiki Session ₹11,999

The ₹11,999 tier includes one private 1:1 Reiki session with me — for whatever's sitting underneath your speaking fear that a group setting won't fully surface. Sometimes it's not about speaking at all. Sometimes it's an old judgment, an old room, an old version of you that flinched once and never fully came back. This session goes there, just for you.

Who This Is For

This isn't for everyone — and it's not meant to be.

It's for the person who already knows what they want to say — in the meeting, the interview, the family gathering, the moment that matters — and watches themselves stay quiet anyway. Not because they don't have the words. Because something in their body slams the door shut first.

If you've ever rehearsed a sentence in your head for so long that the moment passed without you saying it — this is for you.

A Few Things This Isn't

This isn't a public speaking class that hands you templates and tells you to "just practice more."

This isn't a confidence workshop built on affirmations you'll forget by Monday.

This is the work I had to do on myself first, before I ever taught it to anyone else — a real reset, not a performance.
